verdict.summary: All 4 tanker RAO records are physically plausible and traceable to real sources; no fabricated numbers found. KVLCC2 geometry verified exactly (Lpp 320 m, beam 58 m, draft 20.8 m, Cb 0.810, depth 30 m) against MOERI/ResearchGate; displacement claimed 312738 m3 vs sourced ~312622 m3 (0.04% diff, rounding). KVLCC2 uncertainty figures (heave <3%, pitch <1%) confirmed in the real Brodogradnja 71(1) 2020 paper (doi:10.21278/brod71105). L01 Default vessel confirmed as a real Orcina example (103 m tanker, 400 m water depth, NMIWave diffraction, 24 periods / 9 headings) - the source even contains beam=15.95 m, draft=6.66 m, periods and headings that the dataset conservatively left as gaps rather than inventing. OTRC turret-moored FPSO (1:60, Texas A&M) and 138000 m3 membrane LNG carrier (OMAE2010-20077, four tanks, sloshing-roll coupling) both verified as real, on-topic citations. Hard numbers are uniformly either cited-and-verified or correctly flagged estimated/gap. Citations rated thin (not solid) because: (1) the L01 citation URL is BROKEN/WRONG - it points to L01-Default-vessel.pdf with hyphens, which resolves to a generic example index, while the real document is at .../L01%20Default%20vessel.pdf with spaces; (2) the KVLCC2 record conflates the full-scale 320 m hull geometry with the 1:62 model-test benchmark that the uncertainty paper actually describes (186 m full-scale equivalent), so the two citation groups describe slightly different objects; (3) several records lean on single paywalled/secondary citations for the RAO claims.

flagged_records.name: OrcaWave/OrcaFlex L01 Default Vessel (103 m tanker)
flagged_records.issue: Broken citation URL: cited https://www.orcina.com/.../L01-Default-vessel.pdf (hyphens) does not resolve to the vessel doc; correct URL uses spaces (L01%20Default%20vessel.pdf). Content itself is accurate (103 m, 400 m depth, NMIWave). Note source also publishes beam=15.95 m, draft=6.66 m, 24 periods, 9 headings, all left as gap - conservative, not fabricated.

flagged_records.name: KVLCC2 (KRISO Very Large Crude Carrier 2)
flagged_records.issue: Geometry (full-scale 320 m KVLCC2) and the RAO/uncertainty benchmark (a 1:62 model = ~186 m full-scale per the Brodogradnja paper) are conflated under one record; the two cited sources describe slightly different objects. Displacement 312738 m3 vs sourced ~312622 m3 (negligible 0.04% rounding diff). radii_of_gyration correctly marked estimated.

records.name: OrcaWave/OrcaFlex L01 Default Vessel (103 m tanker)

fields.dataset_name: KVLCC2 seakeeping benchmark; RAO uncertainty benchmark Brodogradnja 71(1) 2020
fields.dof_covered: heave, pitch, roll (full 6-DOF in ML/RC papers)
fields.headings: head 180 deg and beam 90 deg; oblique studies exist
fields.frequencies_periods: regular waves one height three periods (cited); exact grid gap
fields.rao_uncertainty: heave under 3 pct, pitch under 1 pct at 95 pct CL
fields.radii_of_gyration: estimated:kyy approx 0.25 Lpp standard pitch-gyradius rule

citations.source: ResearchGate KVLCC2 geometrical-properties table; SIMMAN/MOERI cross-confirmed
Jang et al KVLCC2 seakeeping benchmark with uncertainty analysis Brodogradnja 71(1) 2020

fields.dataset_name: OTRC turret-moored FPSO experiment (vessel/mooring/riser coupled benchmark)
fields.dof_covered: 6 DOF absolute + relative motions + mooring forces; surge and heave RAOs published
fields.headings: head-sea regular swell + JONSWAP wind-sea at various angles, weathervaning turret
fields.frequencies_periods: wide wavelength range; multiple irregular sea states; exact grid gap

citations.source: Vessel/mooring/riser coupled dynamic analysis of turret-moored FPSO vs OTRC experiment

records.name: 138000 m3 Membrane LNG Carrier (sloshing-coupled motion benchmark)

fields.rao_kind: model_test and computed (potential-flow coupled with sloshing)
fields.dataset_name: 138000 m3 LNG carrier four membrane tanks, motion + sloshing coupling (OMAE2010)
fields.dof_covered: 6 DOF RAOs (optical sensors); roll and heave emphasized
fields.headings: head 180 deg and beam 90 deg; roll validated at 150 deg in one study
fields.frequencies_periods: regular waves; heave resonance about 11.6 s; exact grid gap
fields.tank_filling_levels: partially filled at multiple ratios (alters roll RAO)

citations.source: Coupling Effects Between Tank Sloshing and Motions of a LNG Carrier OMAE2010 ASME
Effects of LNG-tank sloshing on global motions of FLNG, Int J Naval Arch Ocean Eng
